title: verbascum × nusaybinense
intro: Verbascum × nusaybinense, also known as the Nusaybin mullein, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Verbascum genus, derived from the cross-breeding of Verbascum lychnitis and Verbascum phoeniceum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Verbascum × nusaybinense include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
